title: Kerala Polls: Nearly 50 per cent Voter Turnout Recorded By 1 pm
description: The figures also showed that Ernakulam district continued to lead with the highest polling percentage of 52.94 per cent and constituency-wise, Thripunithura topped with 58.09 per cent. The lowest turnout came in Ponnani with 44.52 per cent (all 1 pm data)
